ValidationRule.description: Sales CCR Status cannot be changed by Sales Ops other than Completed.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Setup.ShGl_DisableBusinessLogic__c.Disable_CCR_Validation_Rules__c), $Profile.Name = 'Sales Operations', RecordType.Name = 'Sales CCR', ISCHANGED(User__c), OR( AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(User__c), 'Approved')), ISPICKVAL(User__c,'Completed')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(User__c,'Completed')) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You do not have access to change the CCR Status directly. Please follow the approval process and then mark Complete.
